headline: NVIDIA’s Huang says AI will make intelligence a commodity for billions
summary: Investing.com -- NVIDIA chief executive Jensen Huang said on Sunday that artificial intelligence will make intelligence itself a commodity accessible to anyone, from carpenters to shopkeepers, adding that the technology will reach billions of people who have never had access to computing power before.

content.title: NVIDIA’s Huang says AI will make intelligence a commodity for billions
